name: Simple Syrup
directions: Bring the sugar and water to a boil in a heavy medium saucepan over high heat.
Reduce the heat to medium-low.
Simmer, stirring until the sugar is completely dissolved, 6 to 8 minutes.
Let cool completely.
Transfer to an airtight container.
Refrigerate until completely chilled, at least 4 hours.

name: Cafe Au Lait
directions: Heat the milk until amost scalding, pour the coffee into the milk.
Mix the cocoa and sugar in a pot, pour the milk mixture over it and stir until mixed Pour into coffee cups, garnish with whipped cream and chocolate curls if desired.

name: Carrot Cake
directions: mix and serve.
can be served warm, one the rocks, or chilled.
this is very rich.
if you want to make for several folks, just use equal parts of each.

name: Coffee Ice Cream Soda
directions: Mix coffee, sugar and half & half.
Fill 4 tall glasses about halfway.
Add 1 scoop of ice cream to each, then fill up with club soda.
Top with whipped cream.

name: Deluxe Iced Coffee
directions: Pour hot coffee over the cinnamon and stir in brown sugar to taste.
Set aside to cool.
Remove cinnamon stick, stir in milk and cream and chill until very cold. (Prepare to this stage well in advance).
When ready to serve pour mixture into blender and add ice-cream and blend until frothy.
Serve in tall glasses sprinkled with a little chocolate.

name: Perfect Hot Chocolate
directions: Simply add all ingredients ( apart from marshmallows).
Then put milk in and heat up as desired or add hot water when done add marshmallows this is one of the world's best hot chocolates!

similar.name: Hot Chocolate With Homemade Espresso Marshmallows
Copycat Shake Shack Salted Peanut Butter Hot Chocolate
Spiced up Low Cal Hot Chocolate

name: Viennese Coffee
directions: COMBINE COFFEE, CLOVES, CINNAMON AND WATER IN SAUCEPAN; BRING TO A BOIL.
REMOVE FROM HEAT; LET STAND FOR 5 MINUTES.  STRAIN AND COOL.
FILL GLASSES 1/4 FULL WITH CRUSHED ICE; ADD 1 SCOOP ICE CREAM. ADD COFFEE; STIR.
TOP WITH WHIPPED CREAM; SPRINKLE WITH GROUND CINNAMON.
SERVE WITH LONG SPOON AND STRAW.  YIELD: 4-6.
Wold's Best Recipes.

name: Eskimo Kiss
directions: Place ingredients in a shaker filled with ice.
Shake vigorously and strain into a chilled martini glass that is rimmed with finely ground Oreo cookies.

name: Mocha Frappe
directions: Stir together coffee, sugar, and 1 tbs milk in a small glass measuring cup.  Pour into ice cube trays and freeze at least 2 hours, or until firm.
Process coffee ice cubes 1 1/4 cups milk, and chocolate syrup into a blender until smooth.  Dollop evenly with whipped topping and sprinlke with chocolate shavings.
Serve immediately.

name: Whisper
directions: Place all of the ingredients in a blender and whirl on high speed until smooth.
Keep refrigerated at least 2 hours, or until ready to serve.
Blend quickly before pouring.
(Must do ahead.).

name: Banana Cheesecake Cocktail
directions: Pour all ingredients in a cocktail shaker.
Shake & strain into a large, chilled shot glass or a small, chilled martini glass.

name: Absolut Nutcracker Martini
directions: 1/4 fill a cocktail shaker with ice.
add ingredients & shake.
Strain into chilled Martini glass.

name: Irish Whiskey Cake
directions: Blend together cake mix and pudding mix. In separate bowl, blend together milk, oil and whiskey.
Add to dry mix and fold in gently.
Beat in eggs, one at a time, scraping down sides of bowl and mixing two minutes on moderate speed of mixer, until smooth.
Stir in walnuts.
Pour into non-stick or lightly greased bundt-style cake or tube pan. Bake at 325°F for 1 1/2 hours, until lightly browned and cake tests done.
Meanwhile, prepare glaze by melting butter in saucepan. Add sugar, water and 1 tablespoon whiskey. Bring to a light boil and simmer for 10 minutes.
Remove from heat; let cool 3 minutes and stir in remainder of whiskey. When cake is done, remove from oven and pour glaze over cake in pan.
Let cool on rack for one hour. Remove from pan, upright onto place or cake disc, to cool completely.
Cake is best left to mellow, at least overnight, before cutting. Store cake, upside down, in pan. During long storage, turn the cake every couple of days.

similar.name: Coffee Ice Cream Guinness Float With Cookies

name: Sweet Hot Chocolate
directions: Mix together SPLENDA Granulated Sweetener and cocoa in a small saucepan. Gradually add milk, whisking until blended.
Cook over medium-low heat until thoroughly heated. Serve immediately.
Enjoy.

similar.name: Spiced up Low Cal Hot Chocolate

name: Chocolate Affogato With Vanilla Ice-Cream
directions: Place a scoop of ice-cream into 4 small glasses.
Pour 1/4 cup coffee into each glass and drizzle liberally with melted chocolate.
Serve with biscotti or sponge finger biscuits.

name: White Chocolate Mocha Sauce
directions: In a double boiler, combine the corn syrup, marshmallow creme, white chocolate, butter, and milk over hot, but not boiling water.
Stir continuously until the mixture thickens, then remove from heat and stir in vanilla extract.
Store tightly covered in the refrigerator for up to a week.

name: Apple Cobbler
directions: Combine ingredients in shot glass.

name: Carrot Cake
directions: Shake with ice and strain into glass.

name: Carrot Cake
directions: Layer in shot glass.

name: Cookies 'n' Cream
directions: Add the crème de cacao and vanilla schnapps and then fill with milk.

name: Apple Cobbler Steamer
directions: Combine syrups in an 8-ounce cup and fill with steamed milk.
Sprinkle with cinnamon.

name: Coffee Slush
directions: Pour brewed coffee into a large container or bowl.
Add sugar and stir until dissolved.
Stir in half and half and vanilla mix well.
Cover and freeze overnight.
About a hour before serving remove from freezer.
Just before serving chop up for slush.

name: Mocha Delight
directions: In a tall glass or large mug, mix coffee and milk until well blended.
Stir in ice cream and mix until creamy.

name: Quiet As a Whisper
directions: Place all ingredients in a blender.  Blend on high speed until smooth.
Refrigerate at least 2 hours.  Don't skip this step!
Blend quickly on high just before serving.

name: Cafe Au Creme
directions: Melt the marshmallows in the hot coffee and cool.
Whip the cream and fold into the coffee mixture.
Pour into sherbet or parfait glasses.  Top with pecans and chocolate.
Chill and serve.

similar.name: Hot Chocolate With Homemade Espresso Marshmallows

name: Spiced up Low Cal Hot Chocolate
directions: 1. Warm milk to just before boiling.
2. Mix in the above ingredients seperately.
3. Add the milk slowly until dissolved.

similar.name: Hot Chocolate With Homemade Espresso Marshmallows
Copycat Shake Shack Salted Peanut Butter Hot Chocolate

name: Caramel Cappuccino Frappe- Mr. Coffee
directions: Brew coffee according to your coffee machines directions.
Blend ingredients in blender, longer as necessary for larger pieces of ice.
Blend in coffee once brewed.
Pour into glasses.
Top with whipped cream and caramel drizzle.
Serve.

name: Diva Diabetic's Creamy Choco-Milk
directions: Pour all ingredients in a shaker and shake it up!  Pour over a tall glass of ice and enjoy!

similar.name: Spiced up Low Cal Hot Chocolate

name: Gingerbread Martini
directions: Mix first five ingredients in shaker with ice.
Shake very well.

Pour into a chilled martini glass that has been rimmed with graham cracker crumbs. ( I poured a little Bailey's  in a saucer, dipped the rims, then dipped them into the graham cracker crumbs.I actually crushed them myself so they were not SO powdery).
Top with whipped cream and a Pepperidge Farm gingerbread cookie -- awesome!

name: Superrich Hot Chocolate With Coconut Cream
directions: In a small saucepan, combine the coconut milk and sugar and heat, stirring to dissolve the sugar; keep warm. In a medium saucepan, combine the cream and whole milk and bring to a simmer.
Add the chocolate chips and remove from the heat.
Let stand, stirring occasionally, until the chocolate is melted; whisk until smooth.
Pour the chocolate into 8 mugs and spoon some of the coconut milk on top.
Garnish with the marshmallows and serve.

similar.name: Copycat Shake Shack Salted Peanut Butter Hot Chocolate

name: Mexican Drinking Chocolate
directions: Put chocolate in a large bowl.

Combine cream, vanilla beans (seeds and pods), cinnamon and chile powder in a saucepan. Bring to a boil, stirring often. Remove from heat. Press vanilla pods against sides of pan to extract any remaining seeds and cream; discard pods.
Pour cream over chocolate and stir until melted. Add corn syrup and almond extract; stir until smooth.
Package in very clean 1 cup jars. Refrigerate up to 2 weeks.
To serve, combine 1/4 c ganache (use a heated spoon to scrape ganache out of jar) with 1/2 c hot milk and stir until smooth.

similar.name: Superrich Hot Chocolate With Coconut Cream
Hot Chocolate With Homemade Espresso Marshmallows

name: Galliano Whipped Cream
directions: In a chilled bowl, whip cream until it begins to thicken.
Add sugar and liqueur.
Continue beating until soft peaks form.
Store covered in the refrigerator if not using immediately.

name: Starbucks Java Float
directions: In each of 2 glasses, stir together 2 tablespoons of chocolate syrup and 1 cup of club soda.
Place 2 scoops of ice cream in each glass.
Optional - If you wish, you can top with a heaping mound of whipped cream, then drizzle a little additional chocolate syrup on the whipped cream.
Serve immediately.

similar.name: Coffee Ice Cream Guinness Float With Cookies

name: Fireside Vanilla Latte S'mores
directions: Prepare the Vanilla Latte according to instructions on the packaging.
Add the chocolate hazelnut spread to the cup and stir well.
Add the marshmallows.
Crumble the graham cracker over the marshmallows.

The new Van Houtte Specialty Collection offers four beverages designed for Keurig K-Cup systems, including the Vanilla Latte mentioned in the recipes. You can find all of them on Keurig.ca, in grocery stores and certain retailers.

similar.name: Hot Chocolate With Homemade Espresso Marshmallows

name: Coffee Ice Cream Guinness Float With Cookies
directions: Pour beer over ice cream.
add chocolate syrup.
dunk some cookies.
enjoy!

name: Chocolate Cheesecake Smoothie
directions: Cut cream cheese into small pieces and place into cup of Magic Bullet blender or similar blender.
Microwave, uncovered, for 10-15 seconds until cream cheese is softened to a blending consistency.
Beat one egg in a small bowl.  Measure out one tablespoon of beaten egg mixture and add to blender cup.
Add remaining ingredients.
Blend for 30 seconds until frothy.
Pour into serving glass and enjoy!

name: Warm Sugary Milk
directions: Get a glass cup or mug (No plastic).
Pour milk into it.
Add 1 teaspoon of sugar, then mix.
Put cup into microwave for 2 ,or 1 and a-half minutes.
When done, put another teaspoon of sugar, then mix.
Add any other ingredients if you wish like honey, marshmallows, extra sugar/milk, ect.

name: Rainbow Cow
directions: Place 1 - 2 scoops of rainbow sherbet into a tall glass.
Pour Sprite over the sherbet until full.
Serve with a straw and spoon.  Enjoy!

name: Hot Chocolate With Homemade Espresso Marshmallows
directions: For the marshmallows:
Line a 13 by 9 by 2-inch baking pan (33 by 23 by 5 centimeters) with plastic wrap and lightly brush with the oil.

If using gelatin sheets, soak them in 2/3 cup (80ml) cold water in a shallow pan for 10 minutes. If using powdered gelatin, let bloom powdered gelatin in the 2/3 cup cold water. Then add the bloomed gelatin to the warmed up espresso and sugar mixture.

Warm up the espresso with the granulated sugar and vanilla in a saucepan over medium heat. Add the gelatin sheets and the soaking water and heat until the gelatin and sugar dissolve, about 2 minutes, stirring often.
Using a hand mixer, beat the gelatin mixture until it resembles a soft meringue, about 5 minutes. Pour into the lined pan and let stand at room temperature for about 1 hour.

Combine the confectioners' sugar and cornstarch, and sprinkle some onto a large cutting board. Invert the marshmallow onto the board. Peel off the plastic wrap and dust the top of the marshmallow with the cornstarch mixture. Cut the marshmallow into squares using a sharp knife. Dip the cut sides of the marshmallows in the cornstarch mixture and shake off the excess. (Serve immediately or store the marshmallows in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 2 weeks.).
For the hot chocolate:

Heat the milk, cream, espresso and confectioners' sugar in a saucepan over medium-high heat, whisking to dissolve the sugar. Add the chocolate and whisk until smooth. Pour into mugs and garnish with marshmallows.

similar.name: Spiced up Low Cal Hot Chocolate

name: Wiener Eiskaffee
directions: Place ice cream in parfait glass or large glass coffee mug. Pour coffee over ice cream.
Top with whipped cream and sprinkle with powdered sugar. Stir as you drink.

name: Copycat Shake Shack Salted Peanut Butter Hot Chocolate
directions: In a small saucepan, over medium, stir together; chocolate, milk, and sugar and vanilla. Cook, stirring constantly, until chocolate is completely melted and mixture is hot, about 5-7 minutes.
Add peanut butter to chocolate mixture. Remove from heat; whisk until frothy and peanut butter is well incorporated. Serve hot, topped with whipped cream, if desired.

similar.name: Shack Salted Peanut Butter Hot Chocolate
Spiced up Low Cal Hot Chocolate
Hot Chocolate With Homemade Espresso Marshmallows

name: Shack Salted Peanut Butter Hot Chocolate
directions: In a small saucepan, over medium, stir together; chocolate, milk, and sugar and vanilla. Cook, stirring constantly, until chocolate is completely melted and mixture is hot, about 5-7 minutes.
Add peanut butter to chocolate mixture. Remove from heat; whisk until frothy and peanut butter is well incorporated. Serve hot, topped with whipped cream, if desired.

similar.name: Copycat Shake Shack Salted Peanut Butter Hot Chocolate
Spiced up Low Cal Hot Chocolate

name: Whipped Coffee Martini
directions: Chill  rinsed, not dried martini glasses in freezer.
Whipped Topping:
With a hand mixer beat all whipped topping ingredients, coffee sugar water and cinnamon till fluffy and pale. Place in the refrigerator.
Place all cocktail ingredients into a cocktail shaker top with ice and shake well.
Drizzle optional chocolate syrup inside of the chilled glass.
Pour into well chilled martini glasses.
Top with the  chilled whipped coffee foam.
Garnish with a piece of chocolate.
Enjoy!
